2605.25447.title: GeoSVG-RL: Geometry-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Layout-Constrained Text-to-SVG Diagram Generation
2605.25447.paper_summary: Generating structured, editable diagrams remains a significant challenge for contemporary large language models, despite their proficiency in general-purpose vector code generation. The primary difficulty lies in the structural fragility of the output; minor errors such as misaligned connector endpoints, text labels overlapping borders, or complex layouts drifting beyond the canvas boundaries render the resulting SVG files functionally unusable for professional applications. To address these issues, we introduce GeoSVG-RL, a specialized reinforcement learning framework designed for layout-constrained text-to-SVG generation. Unlike standard training objectives that rely solely on maximizing token-level likelihood, our approach optimizes the policy against explicit, executable geometric feedback. The model first produces a structured layout plan that serves as a geometric contract for the subsequent generation of the SVG code. This code is then rendered through a browser-backed verifier, enabling the calculation of fine-grained rewards across six critical dimensions: rendering validity, canvas fitting, precise anchor placement, text containment, graph consistency, and code cleanliness. We utilize Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to refine the model, sampling multiple candidates per prompt to facilitate updates based on relative quality. Starting from a supervised warm-start phase on synthetic data, GeoSVG-RL achieves substantial gains in structural reliability, particularly in arrow-anchor accuracy and text-in-box rates. Quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art systems in local geometric precision and the preservation of graph connectivity, providing a robust pathway toward automated yet reliable technical illustration.
2605.25447.paper_summary_zh: 生成結構化、可編輯的圖表對於當代大型語言模型仍然是一項重大挑戰，儘管它們在通用向量代碼生成方面表現出色。主要的困難在於輸出的結構脆弱性；小錯誤，例如連接器端點未對齊、文本標籤重疊邊界或複雜佈局超出畫布邊界，會使得生成的SVG文件在專業應用中無法正常使用。為了解決這些問題，我們引入了GeoSVG-RL，一個專門的強化學習框架，旨在進行佈局受限的文本到SVG生成。與僅依賴於最大化令牌級似然的標準訓練目標不同，我們的方法針對明確的可執行幾何反饋來優化策略。模型首先生成一個結構化的佈局計劃，作為隨後生成SVG代碼的幾何契約。然後，這段代碼通過瀏覽器支持的驗證器進行渲染，使得能夠在六個關鍵維度上計算細緻的獎勵：渲染有效性、畫布適配、精確的錨點放置、文本包含、圖形一致性和代碼整潔性。我們利用群體相對策略優化（GRPO）來精煉模型，對每個提示進行多個候選樣本，以促進基於相對質量的更新。從合成數據的監督熱啟動階段開始，GeoSVG-RL在結構可靠性方面取得了顯著增益，特別是在箭頭錨點準確性和文本框內率方面。定量評估顯示，我們的方法在局部幾何精度和圖形連通性保持方面始終超越當前的最先進系統，為自動化但可靠的技術插圖提供了一條穩健的途徑。
2605.25447.author: Sifan Li et.al.
2605.25447.authors: Sifan Li, Yujun Cai, Hongkai Chen, Yiwei Wang
